transcript.text:
[Just how many servings did she eat?]
[Not enough fingers]
[How much is it?]
18 servings, right? Yes
[Final verdict]
[I'm done selling for today]
[The one and only dish in our country]
[A collaboration between webfoot octopus and chives]
[I'm eating veggies today]
2 more orders of fried rice?!
[Cleaning the gril]
[A round of applause]
Hello everyone~
For today,
I came here before for my other program "Live Show Today"
I've been craving it lately

So I'm back here again
[Her 2nd visit here]
[Tzuyang fell in love]
I've never seen anyone like you
[Speechless]
Look at this picture
[Exposed]
[Banghwa 1(il)-dong, Gangseo-gu, Seoul, South Korea]
They have this thing called Chives Webfoot Octopus
Minimum of 4 servings
So 1 order of that,
And let's do 3 servings of pork belly
I'll order more later
Excuse me,
It's so nice to see you again We greeted each other earlier
[I'm back!]

I'll do 4 servings of the chives webfoot octopus
3 servings of pork belly
1 order of cider
That's it for now
I'm not even shocked anymore
That's nothing to you
She eats a lot
I've seen it myself
I'm not surprised anymore
[Yay, I can feast]
I'll do dried saury too
She really does eat a lot
I'll get you your food
[She's still in shock]
[Pork Belly]
Hurry and come to me I'm so hungry

Really hungry
[Webfoot Octopus]
[Live Korean webfoot octopus]
[Marinating instead of stir-frying]
[In their special sauce]
[Chives blanket]
[Patiently waiting]
[The only place that makes this]
[Chives Webfoot Octopus]
Thank you
These chives are amazing
Very nutty
Sesame seed powder?
Something like that, but it's nutty
Yum
I didn't order 10 servings yet Only 7

I'm going to eat more after
Webfoot octopus
Wrap it with chives
It's really good
[Allowing chives just for today]
It's good
I think it's better than before
[Now just the octopus]
That's just too delicious
Pork belly, webfoot octopus, and chives
[The best combination]
How's this possible? It tastes even better than my last visit
Pork belly, webfoot octopus, and chives 3 combination
[Thumbs up]
So good
Even the chives alone

[Vibration of truth]
The fried rice with this is amazing
It's no joke
I want to eat rice and noodles too
[What should I eat next?]
Dried saury is here
That looks yummy Thank you
With the dried seaweed
And dried saury
3 pieces
With some chojang (chili pepper paste with vinegar)
Garlic too
[Vibration of Truth]
[Delicious]
Perilla leaf
2 pieces of webfoot octopus

With some pork belly
And chives
[A perfect wrap]
[1 big bite]
I'll try the smaller head first
They used live webfoot octopus
The head is the best
It's very rich in flavor
It's so good
Take 2 heads
[Double-headed]
[Destroyed]
Imagine if these had eggs That'd be incredible
[[Like, Subscribe, Notifications]
[Subscriber]
[Scene Stealer]

[Watching her mukbang]
That scared me
Really
I was forgetting about the pork belly
It tastes good too, but not as good as the webfoot octopus
Let's eat it together
It's good if you eat the pork belly with ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
With chives
[3-layer chives wrap]
[That's GG]
Dried saury
This is the best with garlic
With cabbage
[Cabbage airplane]
[Crash]
He quit eating dried saury, but he said he'll start eating it because of you

She's really good at eating
Everything looks so appetizing
Why doesn't she gain weight?
So jealous
She can eat without having to worry about gaining weight
A big head
That's big
Were those eggs? No
What was that?
Let's eat some more
Eggs
This is the intestines, right?
It's exploding So good
All of these have eggs, right?
[Proof]
I can see the eggs

Will this be mine? I'm going to order more
[Let's hurry and order more]
That's big
They're watching me
This is the only place I can eat this much greens
[Chives welcomed]
So tasty
What time do you guys close? 1AM
[Relieved] I thought I had to go soon
I thought it was all over
Can I have 4 servings of this again and add thin noodles?
4 more servings? And noodles?
[You know me]
How is she eating all of that?
[A new grill]
[Almost done with this]

Are you taking this? Just a sec,
There's a lot more over here
[4 more servings]
A new one
Amazing
Eat the head later
That looks good
Please stay and applaud her She's amazing
[Seal clap]
[I'm just here to eat]
[I can't believe it]
Noodles
[Noodle slurp]
That's so good
It's very savory
It's going to taste better mixed together

Let's mix it all up
[A bite after mixing it]
Get some noodles
That looks good
Insane
[With webfoot octopus]
Stick 2 heads onto the chopstick
[1 shot 2 kills]
[Crash]
[3-second rule]
Head
The eggs
Webfoot octopus is the best
I have to eat their fried rice
Their kitchen looks closed
Is the kitchen still open?

We're still open
Can't leave the heads for the fried rice
I'll eat them separately
Let's do 2 orders of fried rice
Excuse me, 2 fried rice, please
2 fried rice?
You're killing me
More food? Ok
[Fried rice for the finale]
That's another pot of food
4 people eat this much fried rice
4 people for this...?
Cut them into pieces and mix them up
Looks good
That looks amazing
[Even the pork belly]

[Everything with her mouth]
Amazing
I'll eat the head while we wait for it to cool down
[3-combo with the webfoot octopus heads]
[Time for some fried rice]
No words are needed
Eat the fried rice
The noodles were good, but it can't beat the fried rice
[Moving it to a smaller plate to cool it down]
[The spoon never stops moving]
1 big spoonful
[1 big bite]
That's amazing
The whole experience here is great
[1 last bite]
[Scraping the last bits of it]

[Claps as soon as she puts her spoon down]
[That's amazing]
I don't clap too often But she's such an amazing person
Unbelievable
That was a great meal
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
